items.title: Willie Colón, trombonist who pioneered salsa music, dies aged 75
items.dek: His career spanned 60 years and dozens of albums and had been named among the most influential Latino artists of all time.
items.body: His career spanned 60 years and dozens of albums and had been named among the most influential Latino artists of all time.

items.title: How football is helping girls fight against forced marriage
items.dek: Two sisters in an Indian village talk about how football has changed their lives and helped them push back against child marriage.
items.body: Two sisters in an Indian village talk about how football has changed their lives and helped them push back against child marriage.
